# @lumiarq/verifier

Policy and quality verification hooks for generated plans and project boundaries.

## What it does

- Runs verification hooks at lifecycle checkpoints
- Builds verification reports with severities
- Provides checks for naming, placement, boundaries, build, exports, and TypeScript

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @lumiarq/verifier
```

## Contributing

1. Keep check results predictable and actionable.
2. Add tests for failure and pass scenarios.
3. Run `pnpm --filter @lumiarq/verifier test typecheck build`.
